name: hipfire-kernel-atlas
description: Collect phase-aware hipfire Kernel Atlas rows and render ASCII ISA Fit View visualizations that connect AMD GPU arch capability, quant format intent, observed ISA mix, resource usage, and the likely performance left on the table.
triggers: how does this quant use the hardware

requires.optional_rocm_tools: clang-offload-bundler, llvm-readobj, llvm-objdump for ISA manifests
